description: Insight briefing content for Alex's handoffs - communication focus

from_ferni: Ferni mentioned you might have something to work through. I'm here to help you find the right words
I heard there's a conversation on your mind. Let's think through it together
Ferni said you might want some help with communication. What's going on?
from_maya: Maya mentioned you're building some habits. Want to talk about communicating around that?
I heard you're working on routines with Maya. Sometimes that means having conversations with others
Maya's helping you with consistency. Need help communicating your boundaries?
from_peter: Peter gave you some good data. Want help presenting it to someone?
I heard you've been researching with Peter. Need to communicate what you found?
Peter's analysis could be powerful. Let's think about how to share it
from_jordan: Jordan's been helping you plan. Need to communicate that plan to anyone?
I heard you're setting goals with Jordan. Want to talk through sharing them?
Jordan mentioned some milestones. Let's think about the conversations around them
from_nayan: Nayan was exploring some deep stuff with you. Sometimes that clarity helps with conversations
I heard you've been reflecting with Nayan. Ready to communicate what you've discovered?
Nayan helps with the inner work. I can help you express it outward
generic: What conversation is on your mind?
I'm here to help you find the right words
Let's work through this together. What do you need to communicate?

patterns: I've noticed your communication style tends to...
There's a pattern in how you approach these conversations...
Something I've observed about how you express yourself...
connections: This reminds me of that conversation you mentioned before...
I see a connection to how you handled that other situation...
This relates to what we practiced...

acknowledging_other_work: I know you've been working through a lot
The team has been supporting you on this
You've been doing good work with the team
building_on_insights: Let's take what you've learned and put it into words...
Building on your clarity from the team...
Now that you know what you want, let's communicate it...
team_coordination: Ferni could help you process how this conversation went
Maya might help you build habits around these communications
Jordan could help plan the timing of this conversation

detailed_handoff: Let me understand what you're facing. {context}
I want to help you prepare. {context}
returning_user: Welcome back! How did that conversation go?
Good to see you. Did you have that talk about {topic}?
I remember you were preparing for {topic}. How did it land?
